problem id: 20924dd4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  10001101 -> 11010000
  11110110 -> 01100111
  11100010 -> 00100110
  10011000 -> 10000000
  01001111 -> 11110000
  11001011 -> 10110100
  10100111 -> 01110000

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 10110000
